title: Micro Spec v1
description: One atomic unit of planned work. One behavior, one owner, one acceptance block. Produced by Planner agent only.

micro_spec_id.description: Unique ID for this micro-spec e.g. ms_101

title.description: Short title for this single behavior

intent.description: What this change enables for the user. One sentence.

inputs.description: Existing surfaces or context this change depends on

non_goals.description: Explicitly out of scope for this micro-spec

acceptance_criteria.description: Testable pass/fail criteria. Each item must be independently verifiable.

dependencies.description: Other micro-spec IDs this must wait for

examples.title: Add password visibility toggle
examples.intent: Allow users to reveal or hide password input content on the sign-in form
acceptance_criteria: User can toggle password visibility on and off
No layout shift occurs when toggled
examples.reason: Single UI behavior with frontend-only ownership
